source: Natural Earth 110m Admin 0 Countries (https://www.naturalearthdata.com/downloads/110m-cultural-vectors/) — USA/CAN/MEX kept; whole non-contiguous polygons dropped by outer-ring centroid (Alaska lon<-141 OR lat>60; Hawaii lon<-150 AND lat<25; arctic lat>60). Rings are NOT clipped, so every kept coastline is the real curve.
